System Information

Welcome to UMMA University Da'awah Team Admin Panel. This dashboard shows live database totals for members, payments, donations, welfare, content, and resources.

All changes you make here will be immediately reflected to regular users on the system.

Backup status will appear here after the dashboard loads.

Needs Attention

Quick action list for urgent admin work and suspicious activity.

System Health

Quick checks for the installed app, Firebase data, public verification pages, and Research AI.

Run a check before handover, after deployment, or when users report a problem.
Waiting for check

Click Run Check to verify core services.

Dashboard Charts

Database Details

Click any dashboard card above to view its database records.
